extraction.one_line_summary: PÖSTLBERGER survived solo from 5-man break, held off COLBRELLI-led chase by 11 seconds after suffering over final climbs.
tactical_patterns: PÖSTLBERGER attacked solo from break inside 30km despite suffering, exploiting Astana's late chase organization failure.
COLBRELLI consecutive field sprints for second reveal BORA insufficient firepower to control breaks despite sprinter form.
ARCHBOLD refused to work with PÖSTLBERGER in break despite both having opportunity with other two dropped.
Final GC group extremely small over finale climbs yet COLBRELLI still sprinting suggests puncheur-sprinter strength critical.

rider_signals.PÖSTLBERGER Lukas: positive: won stage and took yellow from break despite visible suffering over climbs, suggesting exceptional determination
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: positive: fastest finisher two consecutive days but denied by breakaway control failures, in peak form
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: at very back of field needing same time as leaders to prove Tour leadership capability
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: sprinting well in select finale group at 41 years old over tough climbs
rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: positive: fourth in sprint from small select group over categorized finale climbs
rider_signals.POWER Robert: negative: first to drop from break at 60km remaining when legs failed despite ability to sit on
